name: EnviroTek Remediation Inc.
summary: EnviroTek Remediation Inc. focuses on the development of products/solutions and processes for hydrocarbon remediation. The company was formerly known as Phoenix Metals Corporation and changed its name to Envirotek Remediation Inc. in April 2018. EnviroTek Remediation Inc. was incorporated in 1980 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
